description: IEB Construcciones S.A. operates as a construction company in Argentina. The company manufactures and trades in asphalt emulsions. It also engages in the provision of highway maintenance services; sewerage drainage construction; and improvement of roads in rural areas activities. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Buenos Aires, Argentina. IEB Construcciones S.A. operates as a subsidiary of Inversora Mercedes.
